hero.label: DIGITAL ARCHITECT
hero.title: I design, connect and build digital solutions
hero.subtitle: I don't make pretty websites. I understand your problem, choose the right tools and connect them so your business works better.

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.title: I was solving problems before I knew how to code
about.text_1: Back in the factory, I was already doing what I do now: looking at a process, finding what's broken, and figuring out how to fix it. The only difference is that back then I could only think it. Now I build it.
about.text_2: I studied Surveying Engineering — a degree built on measuring, calculating, and being precise. I worked as a factory hand — where you see how things actually work, not just in theory. And one day I realized that web development let me bring both worlds together: technical precision and hands-on problem solving.
about.text_3: When I sit down with a client, I don't talk about frameworks or APIs. I ask what keeps them up at night, where they're losing money, what they're doing by hand that should be automated. And once I understand the problem — that's when I pick the tools, design the solution, and build it piece by piece.

steps.title: Listen & diagnose
steps.description: I understand your business, your bottlenecks, where you lose time and money. No tech jargon.

steps.title: Design the architecture
steps.description: I choose the right pieces from the digital ecosystem and design how to connect them. Every tool has a purpose.

steps.title: I build it myself
steps.description: I don't delegate. I write the code, configure the automations and make everything work together.

items.title: Smart tax assistant
items.description: A chat where you ask your tax questions and get answers based on real tax authority documentation. Like having a tax advisor available around the clock.

items.title: Design Systems Generator
items.description: You describe your brand — colors, style, personality — and it generates a complete visual guide with every element your website needs. Ready to use.

items.title: Automated web audit
items.description: You enter a website address and it tells you what's working well, what's running slow, and what needs fixing. All explained in plain language, not cryptic metrics.

items.title: AI study platform - In Testing
items.description: A study assistant that helps you prepare for public exams. It quizzes you, explains what you don't understand, and adapts to your level so you study smarter, not harder.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Have a problem that technology can solve?
contact.subtitle: Tell me about it. No strings attached, no PowerPoints, no smoke.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.error: Something went wrong. Try again or email me directly.
